message:
feat(conformance): add evidence retrieval and recovery conformance vectors

15 new golden vectors covering the FCP V3 §6 evidence model:
- Audit chain integrity (genesis, follows, monotonic seq, roundtrip)
- Operation receipt (idempotency, signable bytes determinism, roundtrip)
- Decision receipt (allow/deny with evidence, stable reason codes)
- Zone checkpoint (enforceable heads, serialization)
- Operation intent lifecycle (status exhaustive, roundtrip)
- Decision enum (allow/deny serialization)

Also update vectors/mod.rs FCP2→FCP doc comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
